perf_fee.form: perf_fee_half = k_half * avg_AUM * max(0, nikkei_ret - hurdle)
perf_fee.note: k_H2 >> k_H1: performance fees crystallize at the March fiscal year-end. This seasonality (H2 revenue ~2-3x H1) is the core forecastable structure.
